pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 in properties and compiler plugin configuration.
Rename the artifact and project name from 'webscraper' to 'quizme' to reflect the new application purpose.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 3.5.4 to 3.5.5.
Remove the jsoup dependency as the application is no longer a web scraper.
Remove the SQLite JDBC driver dependency in favor of MongoDB.
Remove the Apache PDFBox dependency for PDF generation.
Remove the openhtmltopdf dependencies for HTML-to-PDF conversion.
Remove the OpenPDF dependency for PDF generation.
Remove the Hibernate community dialects dependency as JPA/SQL is being replaced.
Remove the custom Sonatype snapshot repository required for openhtmltopdf.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready monitoring and management features.
Add Undertow as the embedded web server, excluding the default Tomcat starter.
Add Spring Data MongoDB starter to replace the previous SQL-based data access.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 for utility functions.
Add Spring Security starter to handle authentication and authorization.
Add Spring Security OAuth2 Client starter for social login support (e.g., Google).
Add Lombok as an optional dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Add H2 database as a test-scoped dependency for in-memory testing.
Add Azure WebApp Maven plugin to configure deployment to Azure App Service.
Add Maven Resources plugin with UTF-8 encoding configuration.
Define a default 'dev' Maven profile for local development settings.
Define a 'prod' Maven profile with production-specific optimizations and dependencies.
Define a 'slim' Maven profile for minimal JAR size with aggressive exclusions.
Define a 'production' legacy profile using frontend-maven-plugin for asset processing.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added the /node/ directory to .gitignore to prevent tracking local node runtime or build artifacts.
Added prod.config to .gitignore to exclude production configuration files from version control.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Rewrite the project overview to reflect the shift from a web scraping tool to a quiz application.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Changed 'Spring Boot web scraping application' to 'Spring Boot quiz application' in Project Overview.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Bump Spring Boot version in documentation to match the newer release.
Remove documentation for JSoup as it is no longer a key technology in the quiz app.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Removed 'JSoup 1.17.2 for web scraping and HTML parsing' from Key Technologies.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Add Thymeleaf to the key technologies list to reflect server-side templating usage.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Added 'Thymeleaf for server-side templating' to Key Technologies.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Remove PDF generation libraries from documentation as they are no longer used.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Removed 'PDF Generation: Apache PDFBox... and OpenHTMLtoPDF...' from Key Technologies.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Document the use of Undertow as the embedded server.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Added 'Undertow embedded server for high performance' to Key Technologies.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Update the example test command to use the new application class name.
Update Docker build and run commands to use the new application name.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Changed 'webscraper' to 'quizme' in docker build and run commands.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Replace web scraping component descriptions with quiz-related components.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Replaced WebScraperController/Service descriptions with QuizController and UploadController details.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Update the documented SQLite database filename to match the new application name.
Remove documentation for font requirements needed for PDF generation.
Replace web scraping API endpoints with quiz management and gameplay endpoints.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Removed '/scrape' endpoints and added '/quizzes', '/upload', and gameplay endpoints.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Update the description of async processing to reflect quiz data operations instead of PDF generation.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Changed 'non-blocking PDF generation' to 'non-blocking quiz data processing'.

CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Update development notes to reflect quiz-specific features and multilingual support.
CLAUDE.md.human_impl: Added notes about multilingual interface and Thymeleaf usage; removed PDF async note.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Updated the copied JAR filename to match the new project name 'quizme'.
Added a healthcheck script to the container to enable runtime health monitoring.
Configured the Docker HEALTHCHECK instruction to run the script periodically.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Renamed the Spring Boot application from 'webscraper' to 'quizme' to reflect the new project identity.
Added explicit Spring profile activation configuration for the development environment.
Replaced SQLite datasource configuration with an in-memory H2 database driver for development.
Enabled the H2 database web console for debugging and data inspection.
Updated Hibernate JPA dialect from SQLite to H2 to match the new database driver.
Removed explicit SQL initialization mode configuration, relying on default behavior.
Removed explicit Thymeleaf template engine configuration, relying on Spring Boot defaults.
Removed explicit static resource location and cache configuration, relying on Spring Boot defaults.
Configured Spring Security OAuth2 client registration for Google authentication.
Simplified Spring DevTools configuration by removing custom restart paths and remote secret settings.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: removed additional-paths, poll-interval, quiet-period, remote: secret

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Configured the server port to use an environment variable with a fallback, supporting cloud deployment.
Enabled HTTP/2 support for the embedded web server.
Explicitly configured UTF-8 encoding for servlet requests and responses.
Switched the embedded web server from Tomcat (default) to Undertow with specific thread and buffer optimizations.
Added detailed logging level configurations for MongoDB, Hibernate, and Spring components to reduce noise and aid debugging.
Defined custom log patterns for console and file output.
Added a custom application property to toggle security features, currently disabled.

src/main/resources/templates/quiz-play.h.general_idea: Refactor the page to use a shared Thymeleaf layout fragment instead of a standalone HTML document structure.
Replace custom Tailwind CDN configuration and custom CSS classes with standard Tailwind utility classes and dark mode support.
src/main/resources/templates/quiz-play.h.human_impl: Removed <script> tailwind.config ... </script> and custom CSS; added classes like 'dark:bg-gray-800'

src/main/resources/templates/quiz-play.h.general_idea: Add data-translate attributes to static text elements to support multilingual user interface.
Introduce a footer with buttons to filter quiz content by language (Vietnamese, Hungarian, All).
Redesign the quiz card to use a flip-card style container and move explanations to a modal dialog.
Remove inline JavaScript logic from the HTML template and move it to external files, exposing data via global window variables.
Expand the data passed from the server to the client to include category, subcategory, and title for navigation and context.

src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.general_idea: Refactor the page to use a shared Thymeleaf layout fragment for consistent structure.
Replace custom Tailwind configuration and styles with Flowbite-compatible utility classes.
src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.human_impl: Removed tailwind.config script; added classes like 'dark:bg-gray-800', 'rounded-xl', 'shadow-sm'.

src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.general_idea: Enable dark mode styling for UI elements using Tailwind/Flowbite dark variants.
Update Thymeleaf expressions to bind to the new 'titles' list and its properties instead of 'quizzes'.
src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.human_impl: Changed 'th:each="quizz : ${quizzes}"' to 'th:each="title, iterStat : ${titles}"' and updated text bindings.

src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.general_idea: Integrate translation keys for static text to support multiple languages.
src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.human_impl: Added 'data-translate' attributes to labels like 'Learning Objectives' and 'View Topics'.

src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.general_idea: Display a user-friendly message and navigation when no quiz titles are available.
src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.human_impl: Added 'th:if="${#lists.isEmpty(titles)}"' block with 'No Quizzes Available' text and back link.

src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.general_idea: Display a list of learning objectives for each quiz title.
src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.human_impl: Added nested loop 'th:each="objective ... : ${title.learningObjectives}"' with SVG checkmarks.

src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.general_idea: Load minified JavaScript in production and full source in development environments.
Add a sticky footer with a back button for easier navigation on mobile devices.
src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.human_impl: Added 'footer' element with 'sticky bottom-0' class and back link.
